title: Quick Start Guide
description: Go from unboxing to your first plant reading in 5 minutes.

sections.body: Ready to give your plants a digital heartbeat? Follow these steps to get up and running fast.

sections.heading: Step 1: Create Your Account
sections.body: Head to plantgotchi.com/signup and create an account with your email and a password. You can also sign up directly in the iOS or Android app.

sections.heading: Step 2: Charge or Insert Battery
sections.body: If you have a Solo Sensor or PlantCam, charge it via USB-C until the LED turns green. For the BLE Child Sensor, insert the included CR2032 coin cell battery.

sections.heading: Step 3: Stick It In Soil
sections.body: Push the sensor probe into your plant's soil about 2–3 inches deep. The moisture probes need good soil contact to get accurate readings. Avoid placing it right against the pot edge.

sections.heading: Step 4: Open the App and Scan
sections.body: Open the Plantgotchi app on your phone. Tap "Scan for Sensors" — the app uses Bluetooth Low Energy to discover nearby Plantgotchi devices. Your sensor should appear within a few seconds. Tap it to pair.

sections.heading: Step 5: Add Your Plant
sections.body: Once the sensor is paired, you'll be prompted to create a plant profile. Give your plant a name, choose a species (or leave it generic), pick an emoji avatar, and set your moisture and temperature thresholds. Defaults of 30–80% moisture and 15–30°C work well for most houseplants.

sections.heading: Step 6: Watch the Data Flow
sections.body: Within 30–60 seconds you'll see your first reading appear — moisture percentage, temperature, light level, and battery status. Your plant now has an HP bar and a status indicator. You're all set!

sections.heading: What's Next?
sections.body:
• Learn about reading your sensor data
  • Set up cloud sync for web access
  • Explore AI-powered care recommendations
